'''Loghan Lewis''' (born 23 November 2002) is an [[Australia]]n professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} or {{rlp|lf}} for the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

He has previously played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]]. Lewis was contracted to the [[Canberra Raiders]] in the [[NRL]], and played for them in the [[NSW Cup]].

==Background==
Lewis was educated at [[Keebra Park State High School]].<ref>[https://www.qrl.com.au/news/2020/09/09/rich-rivalries-to-decide-schoolboy-silverware/ Rich rivalries to decide schoolboy silverware]</ref>

He played for the [[Burleigh Bears]] in the [[Mal Meninga Cup]]. He later progressed through the [[Canberra Raiders]] junior system, playing in their [[S. G. Ball Cup|SG Ball]] and [[Jersey Flegg Cup|Jersey Flegg]] sides between 2021 and 2023.<ref>[https://18thman.com/players/loghan-lewis/ 18TH MAN - Loghan Lewis]</ref>

==Career==
Lewis played in the [[Canberra Raiders|Raiders]] under 20s side in 2022 and 2023, winning the Jersey Flegg Coaches’ Award in 2022.<ref>[https://www.raiders.com.au/news/2022/09/15/lewis-and-numambo-earn-jersey-flegg-honours/ Lewis and Numambo earn Jersey Flegg honours]</ref>

He made his [[Canberra Raiders|Canberra]] reserve-grade debut against Blacktown in April 2022 in the [[New South Wales Cup]].

Lewis was elevated to the first team squad in 2023, making his club debut in an [[National Rugby League]] pre-season trial game.<ref>[https://www.zerotackle.com/young-raiders-forward-charged-by-match-review-committee-128299/ Young Raiders’ forward charged by Match Review Committee]</ref> He made 25 appearances in the second tier for the club from the [[Australian Capital Territory]].

He joined the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]] midway through the [[2024 Super League season]].<ref>[https://www.totalrl.com/canberra-raiders-forward-loghan-lewis-makes-immediate-super-league-switch/  Canberra Raiders forward Loghan Lewis makes immediate Super League switch]</ref> He initially signed in May 2024 until the end of the season,<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/crgg3xdggg4o Salford sign Canberra's Lewis for rest of 2024]</ref> with the deal extended for a further year following the completion of the league season.<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cglke8k77g1o Salford forward Lewis signs one-year extension]</ref>

Lewis left [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] to join the [[Bradford Bulls]] on a two-year deal ahead of the [[2026 Super League season]].<ref>[https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/news/25581569.bradford-bulls-announce-loghan-lewis-signing-salford/ Bradford Bulls announce Loghan Lewis as signing from Salford]</ref><ref>[https://www.bradfordbulls.co.uk/article/3356/loghan-the-bull LOGHAN THE BULL]</ref>
